pr.title: Record: 1.0400 BPB -- Hedge Mixer + VRL + AdamW TTT + Polyak EMA

output.summary: 11-layer VRL transformer applies AdamW+Polyak EMA test-time training with a deferred Hedge Mixer blending neural logits and hashed n-gram experts under score-first rules.
techniques: VRL-enhanced transformer with LeakyReLU² and XSA-4
AdamW TTT with Polyak EMA, byte-weighted loss, and frozen early blocks
Deferred score-first Hedge Mixer over neural and n-gram experts
